heading: Munno Para Downs vs Munno Para West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Munno Para Downs, South Australia and Munno Para West, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Munno Para Downs has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Munno Para West (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Munno Para Downs or Munno Para West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Munno Para Downs has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Munno Para West scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Munno Para Downs scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Munno Para West scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Munno Para Downs or Munno Para West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Munno Para Downs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
